title: The Coffee Bean India South Asia Partners is Hiring: Floor Manager (Entry-Level)
company: The Coffee Bean India South Asia Partners

jsonLd.title: The Coffee Bean India South Asia Partners is Hiring: Floor Manager (Entry-Level)
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Floor Manager with drive and ambition, The Coffee Bean India South Asia Partners in Bhopal is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About The Coffee Bean India South Asia Partners:
The Coffee Bean India South Asia Partners is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Maintain high standards of store hygiene and cleanliness
• Manage shrinkage and reduce stock discrepancies
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in SAP Retail
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in KPI Management
• Proficiency in Loyalty Programs
• Proficiency in CRM
• Proficiency in Category Management
• Proficiency in Customer Service

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Annual performance appraisal
• Life and accident insurance
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Bhopal, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with The Coffee Bean India South Asia Partners!
